title: Isolation Creation X: Archaeologist
author: awalsh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Creativity Challenge during the Covid-19 pandemic: 3D museum of random items found around the house during isolation. This is one of many trowels I have owned and has served me well on multiple excavations. Some dirt is still caked on! Source: Objaverse 1.0 / Sketchfab
